abilities.name: Pious
abilities.desc: Increases all primary attributes by 5%.

abilities.name: Scarlet Champion
abilities.desc: Your damaging critical strikes now increase your Holy damage dealt by 2% for 20 seconds. stacking 5 times. Can only occur once per sec.At 5 stacks, you are granted High General.High GeneralYour next Chastise consumes all stacks of Scarlet Champion to deal 25% increased direct damage, and be guaranteed to critically strike.

abilities.name: Determined
abilities.desc: Your Temple Guardian now makes your next ability within 5 seconds free of cost.

abilities.name: Libram of Fervor
abilities.desc: Read from your Libram of Fervor, granting you spell power equal to 30% of your Agility and attack power equal to 30% of your Intellect for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Light's Echo
abilities.desc: Argent Blade now has a 10% chance to strike an additional time.

abilities.name: Testament of Will
abilities.desc: Break an ally free of worldly constraints, making them immune to all movement impairing effects for 10 seconds.Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

abilities.name: Sacred Candle
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Testament of Faith by -60 sec and the duration of Sacred Restraint by -30 sec.

abilities.name: Deep Meditation
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of your Oath Chain by 5 sec.

abilities.name: Spiritual
abilities.desc: Increases your Energy regeneration by 20%.

abilities.name: Tyr's Guard
abilities.desc: Testament of Hope now summons an additional copy of yourself.

abilities.name: Reckoning
abilities.desc: Unleash a powerful Oath Breaker, dealing 27 + 17.5% AP + 50% Stamina Holy damage and restoring 15 Energy for each enemy struck.Consumes your Oaths, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

abilities.name: Solemn Soldier
abilities.desc: Increases your melee haste by 5% and expertise by 5.

abilities.name: Crusader's Brand
abilities.desc: Brand an enemy for 20 seconds, preventing them from mounting, fleeing, or increasing their movement speed above normal movement speed and when they deal direct damage they take 243 + 27.5% holy SP + 18.5% AP Holy Damage.While marked enemies can always be seen by the Crusader even while stealthed or invisible.

abilities.name: Holy Combatant
abilities.desc: Your Argent Blade now also extends the duration of Interdict on your target by 1 sec.

abilities.name: Paladin Training
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Righteous Lunge and Argent Blade by 20%.

abilities.name: Call of the Monastery
abilities.desc: Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, increases your attack power by 5%.

abilities.name: Tyr's Blessing
abilities.desc: Condemn now stacks 1 additional time.

abilities.name: Legacy of the Silver Hand
abilities.desc: Casting Argent Blade or Scarlet Hammer now guarantees your next 2 instances of damage dealt by Scourgebane to critically strike.Increases the critical damage of Scourgebane by 15%.

abilities.name: Interdict
abilities.desc: Forbid an enemy from sinning, silencing them for 6 seconds. If they are an Undead or Demon they are unable to be healed for the duration.

abilities.name: Templar's Might
abilities.desc: Your Righteous Lunge and Chastise used on enemies affected by your Condemn now deal 6% increased damage per stack.

abilities.name: Spiritual Abdicator
abilities.desc: Your Testament of Hope now reduces damage taken by an additional 0% per copy.

abilities.name: One With The Light
abilities.desc: Casting Oath Breakers now triggers Zealotry on your target and reduces the cooldown of Librams, Force of Golganneth, and Mortal Abdication by -1 sec.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

abilities.name: Fortified Body
abilities.desc: Allies within 40 yds receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.Additionally, increases your maximum health by 6%.

abilities.name: Pulverizing
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Condemn now has a 15% chance to consecrate the earth around you with holy fervor, dealing 91 + 22.5% holy SP + 10% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Might of Aggramar
abilities.desc: Physical damage dealt now has a 25% chance to increase the tick rate and reduce cooldown of your next Blade of Faith by -10%, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Sanctify
abilities.desc: Your Libram spells now grant you 10% increased melee haste for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Warrior of Tyr
abilities.desc: Periodic damage dealt now has a 10% chance to generate 5 Energy.

abilities.name: Scourge-Defense Training
abilities.desc: Warrior of Dawn now also increases the damage and critical strike chance of your next Argent Blade by 20%.

abilities.name: Norgannon's Wrath
abilities.desc: Target an enemy and leap into the air. After a short delay, you blast them with immense holy force, dealing 1506 + 100% holy SP + 100% AP Holy damage to up to 10 enemies within 5 yds and reduces their damage and healing done by -10% for 5 seconds.Damage dealt pierces all immunities, resistances, and damage absorption effects.Scales with modifiers to Chastise.

abilities.name: Disciplined Blows
abilities.desc: Your healing done triggers a holy pulse around healed targets, dealing 89 + 5% AP + 20% Agility Holy damage to nearby enemies.Cnly occur once every 0.5 sec.

abilities.name: Righteous Upheaval
abilities.desc: Unleash a dominating Oath Breaker, dealing 31 + 45% AP + 45% SP Physical damage, increased by 3% for each time you triggered Zealotry during your Oath Chain.Consumes your Oaths, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

abilities.name: Glory
abilities.desc: Bring glory to the holy light, increasing your attack speed by 30% for 5 seconds.After the duration, you gain Downfall. DownfallYou heal for 50% of all damage dealt for 5 seconds. After the duration, you gain Redemption.RedemptionIncreases attack speed by 30% and you heal for 50% of all damage dealt for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Blade of Faith
abilities.desc: Unleash a devastating Oath Breaker on an enemy dealing 119 + 140% SP + 70% AP Holy damage over 21 seconds. This ability can critically strike.Consumes your Oaths, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

abilities.name: Martyr
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Gift of Zeal by 20%.

abilities.name: Mark of Aggramar
abilities.desc: Reduces the Energy cost of your Testaments by -50%.

abilities.name: Argent Blade
abilities.desc: Crush an enemy with argent fervor, dealing 160% Weapon Damage plus 15 + 35% AP + 100% holy SP, healing you equal to the damage dealt, and extending the duration of your Oath Chain by 3 sec.

abilities.name: Sacred Oath
abilities.desc: Critical strikes now remove 1 sec from the duration of Oathkeeper when used.Oathkeeper40% of damage taken is now delayed and dealt to you over 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Blessed Strikes
abilities.desc: Reduces the Energy cost of your Oath Breakers by -10.

abilities.name: Libram of Zeal
abilities.desc: Read from your Libram of Mortal Abdication, increasing your melee haste by 20% and causes your damaging abilities to reduce the cooldown of Righteous Upheaval by -2 sec for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Staffguard
abilities.desc: Casting Sacred Swing now grants you Staffguard, absorbing 125 + 30% Stamina damage, scaling with Stamina, parry and dodge rating, for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Fury of Aggramar
abilities.desc: Increases the damage dealt by Libram of Consecration by 100% and the effectiveness of your Librams by 25%.

abilities.name: Profound Enlightenment
abilities.desc: Attain enlightenment, reducing the remaining cooldown of Testaments by 50%.

abilities.name: One-Punch Man
abilities.desc: Increases the the damage of Oath Breakers and Titanstrike by 20%.

abilities.name: Pious Sweep
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Chastise by 25% on enemies above 75% health or affected by Tranquil Circle.

abilities.name: Devotion of Khaz'goroth
abilities.desc: Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.Damage dealt with auto attacks reduce the cooldown of Libram spells by -0.5 sec.

abilities.name: Parry Dance
abilities.desc: When you critically strike with auto attacks or parry an attack, your chance to parry is now increased by 3% for 5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Bells of Light
abilities.desc: Increases your Agility, Intellect, and hit chance by 3%

abilities.name: Paragon
abilities.desc: Increases your Stamina by 10, plus an additional amount equal to 10% of your Agility.

abilities.name: Templar Rituals
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Righteous Tempest now deals an additional 35 + 10% holy SP + 8.5% AP Holy damage, and upon dealing damage, you pull enemies within 15 yds towards you.

abilities.name: Pure Focus
abilities.desc: Increases the chance to trigger Scourgebane by 5% and your chance to hit by 2%.

abilities.name: Condemnation
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance gained through Condemn by 3%.

abilities.name: Eternal Blessing
abilities.desc: Increases your Holy damage and healing done by 15% for 30 seconds.While active, Oath Breakers deal an additional 141 + 12% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Judgement
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Scourgebane, Scarlet Hammer, and Titanstrike by 25% on enemies below 20% health.

abilities.name: Blade Sermon
abilities.desc: Increases the Weapon Damage dealt by Zealotry by 10%.

abilities.name: Eternally Devoted
abilities.desc: Damage dealt through Eternal Blessing now reduces the cooldown of Libram spells by -4 sec.

abilities.name: Duty Calls
abilities.desc: Casting abilities that grant an Oath now increases your damage dealt and movement speed by 2% for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Radiant Blade
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Oath: Righteous Lunge by 25%.

abilities.name: Divine Charge
abilities.desc: You and your party members leap upon a divine steed, increasing their movement speed by 100% and causing them to trample nearby enemies for 119 + 20% AP + 40% holy SP Holy Damage every 1 sec for 15 seconds.While active, casting does not dismount you or your allies. Can only be used outdoors.

abilities.name: Argent Knight
abilities.desc: Increases the damage dealt by Righteous Tempest and Condemn by 30%.Additionally, Righteous Tempest now reduces all damage taken by -20% while active.

abilities.name: Liberty
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of your Libram spells by -30 sec.

abilities.name: Barrier of Light
abilities.desc: Emit saving light, increasing the healing received by nearby party and raid members by 40% for 15 seconds.For the duration, threat generated by your allies is redirected to you.

abilities.name: Tome of Light
abilities.desc: Grants a shield equal to 100% of your maximum health for 30 seconds, resets the cooldown of Barrier of Light and Tranquil Circle, and grants an additional effect for each.Tome of Light: Barrier of LightYour next Barrier of Light within 30 seconds removes the Oathkeeper stagger debuff.Tome of Light: Tranquil CircleYour next Tranquil Circle within 30 seconds triggers instantly.

abilities.name: Chakra of Light
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Testaments by -30 sec and Oath Breakers now heal allies around the target for 20 + 35% SP.

abilities.name: Chakra of Power
abilities.desc: Melee attacks now restore 1 Energy, plus an additional 2 Energy when they critically strike.

abilities.name: Testament of Strength
abilities.desc: Your next 3 Titanstrikes are usable regardless of your target's health percentage and deal 25% increased damage. Lasts 1 minute.Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

abilities.name: Warrior of Dawn
abilities.desc: Melee damage dealt now has a 10% chance to reset the cooldown and reduce the Energy cost of your next Argent Blade by -50%.

abilities.name: Vindication
abilities.desc: Strike an enemy with zeal, dealing 31 + 28.5% AP + 35% SP Physical damage, triggering Zealotry, and granting an Oath.Oath: Your damaging abilities have a 10% chance to trigger Zealotry.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

abilities.name: Sacred Swing
abilities.desc: Swing at enemies in front of you, dealing 125% High Threat Weapon Damage plus 9, slowing their attack and movement speed by -20% for 10 seconds.Only usable after avoiding an attack.

abilities.name: Aggramar's Rage
abilities.desc: Increases your Holy critical strike chance by 3% and your expertise by 5.

abilities.name: Battlepriest
abilities.desc: While above 80% health or below 20% health, you now take 20% reduced Magic damage.

abilities.name: Mending Ward
abilities.desc: Oath Breakers now grant you a stack of Mending Ward for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.Mending WardNext instance of direct damage taken while below 35% maximum health will consume these stacks to heal you for 395 + 25% Stamina. Healing scales with your Stamina and parry rating.

abilities.name: Heaven's Finest
abilities.desc: Damaging abilities now grant Heaven's Finest for 12 seconds, stacking 6 times.Heaven's FinestIncreases your movement speed by 5%.At 6 stacks, increases your Energy regeneration by 100% for 8 seconds.Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

abilities.name: Blessing of Aggramar
abilities.desc: Righteous Lunge now has a 25% chance to generate an additional stack of Oath: Righteous Lunge.

abilities.name: Transcending Strikes
abilities.desc: Your Divine Force will now trigger a -30 sec reduced cooldown when used on enemies affected by Blade of Faith.

abilities.name: Serendipity
abilities.desc: Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, reduces the cost of your spells and abilities by -5%.

abilities.name: Finesse
abilities.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 2% and reduces the duration of disarm effects against you by -15%.

abilities.name: Divine Force
abilities.desc: Leap at an enemy with divine force, stunning them for 6 seconds, dealing 20 + 100% SP + 55% AP Holy damage, and interrupting non-player spellcasting for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Radiance
abilities.desc: Reduces the Energy cost of Vindication by -5.

abilities.name: Combat Training
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Oaths by 20%.

abilities.name: Blessing of Eonar
abilities.desc: Using Libram spells now increases your damage dealt and healing done by 10% for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Tenacious Defender
abilities.desc: Casting Libram of Tenacity now also heals you for 20% of your maximum health.

abilities.name: Martial Paladin
abilities.desc: Increases your Agility by 5% and your chance to hit by 3%.

abilities.name: Bursting Impact
abilities.desc: Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25%.

abilities.name: Libram of Tenacity
abilities.desc: Read from your Libram of Tenacity, reducing your Physical Damage taken by -30% for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Courage
abilities.desc: Increases your movement speed and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects on you by -10%.

abilities.name: Holy Constitution
abilities.desc: Increases your damage dealt versus Undead by 5, scaling with level, and increases your chance to resist disease effects by 30%.

abilities.name: Righteousness
abilities.desc: Your Chastise now always triggers Scourgebane on your target.

abilities.name: Sturdy
abilities.desc: Increases your maximum health and Energy by 5%.

abilities.name: Force of Golganneth
abilities.desc: Explode with holy power, dealing 310 + 25% AP + 25% holy SP Holy damage and triggering Zealotry every 1 sec to nearby enemies for 5 seconds.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.While active, your Temple Guardian spell has its Energy cost reduced by -50%.

abilities.name: Judgement of the Gods
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Titanstrike by 50%.

abilities.name: Deep Secrets
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of your Librams and Testaments by 10 sec.

abilities.name: Final Prayer
abilities.desc: Doubles the healing done to you by Testament of Fortitude and Testament of Faith.

abilities.name: Sacred Defense
abilities.desc: When you take Physical damage you now strike back at enemies for 15% of the damage dealt as Holy damage. Can only occur once per sec.

abilities.name: Silverhand Incantation
abilities.desc: Chant a silverhand incantation and toss a holy hammer at your target, charging you to them and removing Sacred Restraint from you and them if they are an ally.Upon reaching your target you deal 300 + 200% AP Holy damage to all nearby enemies and heal nearby allies for the same amount.

abilities.name: Testament of Hope
abilities.desc: Summons 2 copies of yourself that charge at a nearby enemy and aid you in combat for 20 seconds.While within 15 yds of you, each copy reduces all damage you take by -25%. Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

abilities.name: Oath Flow
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of Oath Chain by 2 sec.

abilities.name: Deliverance
abilities.desc: Critically striking with Vindication or Righteous Lunge now deals 50% additional Physical damage.

abilities.name: Iron Penance
abilities.desc: Dealing damage with Zealotry now applies Iron Penance to the target, increasing their Physical damage taken by you by 1% for 3 seconds, stacking 10 times.

abilities.name: Titanfall
abilities.desc: Your Titanstrike now heals you for twice the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Improved Benediction
abilities.desc: Benediction now grants your target armor based on your Agility and Stamina for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Divine Strikes
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Scourgebane now increases the damage of Argent Blade by 5% for 6 seconds, stacking 10 times.

abilities.name: Focused
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Blade of Faith and Righteous Tempest by 25%.

abilities.name: Righteous Tempest
abilities.desc: Unleash a whirling Oath Breaker, dealing Weapon Damage plus 71u+SP*0.25 damage to nearby enemies, scaling with spell power, every 1 sec for 3 seconds.Consumes your Oaths, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

abilities.name: Retribution
abilities.desc: Melee damage dealt now has a 20% chance to strike 2 additional times for 30% of the damage dealt as Holy Damage.

abilities.name: Binding Scripture
abilities.desc: Healing an ally now redirects 10% of their damage taken to you and reduces your damage taken by -5% for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

abilities.name: Judicator
abilities.desc: Increases your parry and dodge chance by 3%.

abilities.name: Sacred Style
abilities.desc: Increases your Holy healing done and received by 8%.

abilities.name: Holy Edge
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Scourgebane and Scarlet Hammer now strikes 1 additional nearby enemy.

abilities.name: Chivalric
abilities.desc: Increases your critical damage with Holy spells and abilities by 15%.

abilities.name: Sacred Resistance
abilities.desc: Casting Reckoning now increases your Armor by 15% for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Absolution
abilities.desc: Taunt all enemies within 8 yds for 4 seconds and increase your movement speed by 50% for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Lightkeeper
abilities.desc: Periodic damage dealt by Condemn now has a 15% chance to increase your parry chance by 2% for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.Periodic damage dealt by Condemn also has a 15% chance to burst, dealing 100 + 22% AP Holy damage to up to 5 enemies within 5 yds of the target.

abilities.name: Conviction
abilities.desc: Casting Sacred Swing now increases your melee haste by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

abilities.name: Grace of Aman'thul
abilities.desc: Reduces the Energy cost of Righteous Lunge by -5 and Sacred Swing by -10.

abilities.name: Blessed Padding
abilities.desc: Increases your Armor contribution from mail items by 50% and reduces damage taken from area of effect attacks by -10%.

abilities.name: Uther's Legacy
abilities.desc: Your Condemn now heals you for 75% of the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Faith Guard
abilities.desc: While a Libram is active, your Chastise will now unleash a line of holy power, dealing 112 + 25% AP High Threat Holy damage.

abilities.name: Disciplined Mind
abilities.desc: Increases the healing of Benediction by 15% and causes it to dispel 1 poison and disease effect.

abilities.name: Untainted
abilities.desc: Effectively healing yourself now reduces your Physical damage taken by -10 + 10% Stamina for 8 seconds.Can only occur every 15 sec.

abilities.name: Testament of Fortitude
abilities.desc: Meditate for 15 seconds, restoring 5% of your maximum health every 1 sec and reducing damage taken by -50%.Each second you will also remove 1 disease effect from yourself. Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

abilities.name: Battle Hardened / Upheave!
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Righteous Upheaval by -5 sec.

abilities.name: Holy Light / Light's Guidance
abilities.desc: Your Benediction now has a 1.5 sec cast time, but now heals for 100% more.

abilities.name: Paladin Training / Priest Training
abilities.desc: Triggering Zealotry now has an 8% chance to grant you an additional auto attack on your next strike.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

abilities.name: Fervent Castigation / Condemnation
abilities.desc: Casting Righteous Upheaval or Blade of Faith now grants you Oath: Retribution and starts your Oath Chain.Oath: RetributionCritical damage increased by 5%.

abilities.name: Holy Crusader / Scarlet Judicator
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Divine Force by -30 sec.

abilities.name: Holy Warstaff / Way of the Monk
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Reckoning by 20%.

abilities.name: Justicar of the Light / Guardian of the Light
abilities.desc: Removes the cooldown from Benediction, but increases its Energy cost by 10.

abilities.name: Patience / Justice
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of Interdict by 2 sec and its cooldown by -5 sec.

abilities.name: Transcendent Guardian / Armor of Faith
abilities.desc: Charging to an ally with Temple Guardian now has a 40% chance to refresh a charge.

abilities.name: Scarlet Secrets / Teachings of the Cathedral
abilities.desc: Every 2nd cast of Argent Blade now grants you Oath: Retribution.Oath: RetributionCritical damage increased by 5%.

abilities.name: Holy Tempest / Whirling Tempest
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Righteous Tempest now spreads Condemn on affected enemies to a nearby enemy.
